title: Ju5tAModpack
description: A basic modpack that optimizes FPS and adds a few utility mods that make gameplay much better!
body:
# Ju5tAModpack

This is a modpack that includes the most important mods for good performance and gameplay.

You can also use this Modpack in the Norisk Client!

All Mods that are included are already preconfigured and optimized so you can start playing right away!

## Why should I use this pack?

If you want to optimize your Minecraft experience performancewise and also want to have all of the quality of life mods like waypoints, world map, coordinate hud, shulkerbox preview and zoom, this pack is the perfect option!

## Details

This modpack's purpose is mainly to optimize minecrafts performance. For this, a fine-grained selection of performance mods was selected and tested to ensure best performance on any machine. 

This pack also includes a coordinate mod to show player position in the hud and also includes Xaero's World Map and Minimap that enhance the game with maps and also add a Waypoint system. 

The simple voice chat mod is also included to provide a voice chat on servers, this mod only works on servers that also have the voice mod enabled and integrated.

There are also some important things included that improve gameplay. The included mods make sure to make the fog unobtrusive, add toggleable fullbright, add a scrollable zoom and even a texture pack to remove the pumpkin blur comes with it. The pack also makes sure to include borderless full-screen functionality (This improves multi-tasking while minecraft is in full-screen)

It also adds support for most optifine resourcepack features and makes custom skyboxes possible. 

The modpack also improves the Minecraft options by adding the possibility to change the debug keybinds (Those with F3) if your keyboard doesn't have the F3 key.

This modpack makes gameplay much better and improves Minecraft. For me, this pack adds everything that I need and is the perfect start point for a new instance.

## Important Keybinds

| Action | Mod | Key |
|--|--|--|
| Change HUD Position | Coordinates Display | F9 |
| Cycle Display Mode | Coordinates Display | Ö |
| Open Coordinates GUI | Coordinates Display | Ä |
| Toggle HUD | Coordinates Display | F7 |
| Change Gamma | Gamma Utils | Arrow Up / Arrow Down |
| Toggle Gamma | Gamma Utils | Right Arrow |
| Voice Chat Menu | Simple Voice Chat | V |
| Mute Microphone | Simple Voice Chat | M |
| Hide Voice Icons | Simple Voice Chat | H |
| Disable Voice Chat | Simple Voice Chat | F10 |
| Minimap Settings | Xaero's Minimpap | # |
| New Waypoint | Xaero's Minimpap | B |
| Open Waypoint Screen | Xaero's Minimpap | U |
| World Map Settings | Xaero's World Map | + |
| Open Map | Xaero's World Map | O |
| Zoom | Zoomify | C |
